highlights.summary: A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: Is CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology a good option?
faqs.answer: CT Educational Society established CT Institute of Engineering, Management & Technology, Jalandhar (CTIEMT) in 2004 with the prime focus to create leading research and development facilities in the field of Engineering, Technology & Management. It is approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) and affiliated to Punjab Technical University, Jalandhar. The institute currently offers eight UG programmes in engineering and four PG programmes in the field of Engineering, Management & Computer Applications. It currently has 10 departments. The university has an active placement cell and good infrastructure, making it an overall good option for students to take admission in.

faqs.question: How is life at CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology?
faqs.answer: CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology provides multiple facilities to its students and has an infrastructure that is conducive to learning. There are two research labs with Wi-Fi. The whole campus is covered with Wi-Fi. Classrooms are very large and with projectors for easy and smart learning. There are two hostels which are very good and the food prepared in the mess is healthy, hygienic and tasty. The sports facilities in the university include Basketball Court, Cricket Ground and Football Ground. The availability of these facilities make students' life at CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology enjoyable, making learning easier.

faqs.question: When are CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology application forms out?
faqs.answer: As per the information on Shiksha, CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology (CTIEMT), Punjab admissions 2023 are open to all the courses. Candidates can apply through the official website. The application forms are usually out before the start of an academic year. The forms for this year were out in the month of august. Students must fill the forms with all the correct details.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: CT Institute of Engineering, Management & Technology Jalandhar offers BTech, MTech, MBA, and MCA programmes in full-time mode. It also offers BTech (Lateral entry) programme. CTIEMT BTech programme is a four-year programme offered under eight specialisations while a two-year MTech programme is offered under two specialisations. Along with the above programmes CTIEMT offers a two-year MBA under four specialisations. CTIEMT courses along with their eligibility criteria and annual fee are mentioned below:

faqs.answer: A:    Both CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology or CT Institute of Technology offer multiple B.Tech courses. CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology offer B.Tech across 10 specializations while CT Institute of Technology offers 6 courses across B.Tech. The fee structure for B.Tech courses at both CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology and CT Institute of Technology ranges from INR 2.1 L to INR 2.4 L. The eligibility criteria at both the places is that candidates must have completed 10+2 with 45% along with valid marks in JEE Main. Thus, making CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology almost as expensive as CT Institute of Technology.
faqs.question: Is CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology more expensive than CT Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology offers admissions to multiple UG and PG programmes like B.Tech, M.Tech, MBA and MCA. The institute offers B.Tech programmes at the UG level and M.Tech, MBA and MCA programmes at PG levels. Admission to the B.Tech programme is done on the basis of JEE Main score. Further, admission to MBA and MCA programmes is done on the basis of the MET PTU entrance exam. Along with this, students seeking admission in various programs at CT Institute of Engineering, Management & Technology, Jalandhar (CTIEMT) have to clear class 12th with 45% marks from a recognised board.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores are accepted by CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology is in Jalandhar and was established in the year 2004. It is approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) and affiliated to Punjab Technical University, Jalandhar. The university offers courses at the UG and PG levels. At the UG level, the course offered is B.Tech and the courses offered at the PG level include M.Tech, MCA and MBA. The fee structure for CTIEMT starts at INR 78,000, which is the fee structure for the M.Tech course. The fee structure in the university goes as high as INR 2.4 Lakhs which is the fee structure for one of the specializations of B.Tech.
faqs.question: How costly is CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    The university offers only 1 UG course i.e B.Tech which is offered across multiple specializations. CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology offers a total of 10 B.Tech courses including lateral courses as well. The B.Tech course fee structure ranges from INR 2.1 Lakhs to INR 2.4 Lakhs. The fee for B.Tech in Civil Engineering and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering and B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering is INR 2.4 Lakhs, for B.Tech in Automobile Engineering (Lateral Entry) and B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering (Lateral Entry) is INR 2.1 Lakhs.
faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: A short review of a very good college and precious college.

review_content.Placements: This college placement is good nowadays. Around 80% of students get placed here. The highest package is 51 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Overall, placements are good. Here, top companies like Amazon, Hero, Wipro, Infosys, and Microsoft are top recruiters.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of college is good but not as good as we compare to other colleges. Even though classes are good but not air-conditioned this is the one fault. Boards are also not as digital as others compared to other colleges. Overall, the infrastructure is good this can be adjusted because fee is also low compared to other colleges.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with staff, good placements in the past few years also, and really good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Here also, placements are made based on CGPA. If you have technical skills plus soft skills also, you can easily be placed. It takes a lot of hard work to get placed. You will have to do it on your own, but the staff here is much supportive. They will support you in every case they can. Many top companies came here for internships and placements like Infosys, Wipro, HCL, Coca-Cola, Tech Mahindra, IBM, RBS, Dell, etc. The highest package here for B.Tech is 31 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Open Wi-Fi is available in all departments of college. There are a number of labs here. Classrooms are also quite good. All the departments have their own libraries. Although the campus is quite big. There are number of gardens and ground to hill and relax. Dispensary is also available here. There are several canteens here, or we can say that every department has a canteen. There are much opportunities for sports and cultural activities. Hostel mess food is so good compared to other college hostels.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The review of CT Group of Institutions.

review_content.Placements: There is a minimum of 60% required for taking admission in the CT Group of Institutions. They offer packages ranging from 2.3 to 12 LPA during placements. Most recruiting companies come from Jalandhar and Chandigarh, with some from Delhi. The percentage of student placements is around 20%.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is quite impressive and spacious. There are multiple libraries available, all of which are clean and stocked with a variety of books. The campus has five canteens, and the food quality is good and affordable.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent infrastructure in ECE department.

review_content.Placements: About 70-85% students are placed in this course. The highest salary package offered is between 7 LPA - 8 LPA. Top hiring companies are Wipro and HCL. About 25% students get internships in this college. Placements drive is excellent but the companies take serious interviews before selections.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of CT Group of Institutions is very good. I live in the hostel where the security is very tight as outsiders are not allowed in the campus. All the other facilities like Wi-Fi, AC, etc. are available in our college. Medical facilities are good in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Life at CT college for B.Tech CSE.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 80% percent students placed in college by mass recruiter companies with average package of 4-5 Lacs. The highest package is offered by companies is 14 Lacs. Top recruiting companies like o7 sol, jaro education, ibm, tcs, byjus etc. Every student got internship from my course in above mentioned companies. Mainly the work is software develepor.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are two research labs with Wi-Fi whole campus covered with Wi-Fi but not very fast speed. Classrooms are very large and with projectors but not with smartboards. There are two hostels which is very good and quality of food provide by mess and canteen is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college.

review_content.Placements: The highest salary package offered was 25 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges between 5 LPA - 6 LPA. Internships are also offered at this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. Laboratories are excellent. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Hostel is very good. The food served in the mess is average. Canteen is also available. The food quality is like 5-star hotels. Our campus is very good.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are very good. They are very cooperative with students. Semester exams are average. The pass percentage is good. We have to score 24 marks out of 60.

admission_process.title: CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology admission 2025 is currently open. The institute offers various courses at UG and PG levels, such as BTech, MBA, MTech and MCA. To be eligible for admission toCT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology, candidates are required to fill out the eligibility and selection criteria set by the college. The college offers entrance-based admission to all the courses. The college offers an application process conducted in online mode. Read the following article to know more about CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology admission 2025 along with course eligibility, selection criteria and admission process:

CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology admission to its UG and PG courses is entrance-based. Candidates seeking admission to any courses are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria of their desired courses and then appear for the selection process accepted by the institute. Interested candidates can check out the below table forCT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology courses, along with their eligibility and selection:
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria
Class 10 and Class 12 from a recognised board
Graduation in relevant from a recognised university/institute
Graduation in relevant from a recognised university/institute
Graduation in relevant from a recognised university/institute
Merit-Based

CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology admission is based on entrance. To get admission, candidates need to apply and appear for the entrance exam accepted by the college. If you want complete details about theCTIEMT, Jalandhar admission process 2025,go through the following section.
1: Application Form
Candidates looking for admission to various programmes at CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology are required to complete the admission form online.
2: Selection Round

To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to fill out eligibility and selection selection criteria. The selection criteria of all the courses is entrance-based. To be eligible candidates, candidates are required to apply and appear for JEE Main, MET, GATE and other entrance exams.
3: Final Seat Confirmation
The college releases the merit list for shortlisted at their official website. The selected applicants must make aCTIEMT feepayment within the given deadline to secure their seats.

faqs.question: Does CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology accept CBSE 12th score?
faqs.answer: Yes, CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology requires students to have completed their class 12th from a recognised board including CBSE. Students must have secured at least 45% in class 12th for admission to B.Tech courses. Along with securing 45% marks in class 12th, candidates must also appear for and clear the JEE Main exam. Students can apply for admissions by filling the online application form. The date of JEE Main 2024 Exam Date Session is between 24 Jan '24 and 1 Feb '24.

faqs.question: How costly is CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology?
faqs.answer: CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology is in Jalandhar and was established in the year 2004. It is approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) and affiliated to Punjab Technical University, Jalandhar. The university offers courses at the UG and PG levels. At the UG level, the course offered is B.Tech and the courses offered at the PG level include M.Tech, MCA and MBA. The fee structure for CTIEMT starts at INR 78,000, which is the fee structure for the M.Tech course. The fee structure in the university goes as high as INR 2.4 Lakhs which is the fee structure for one of the specializations of B.Tech.

reviews.review_heading: A short review of a very good college and precious college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of college is good but not as good as we compare to other colleges. Even though classes are good but not air-conditioned this is the one fault. Boards are also not as digital as others compared to other colleges. Overall, the infrastructure is good this can be adjusted because fee is also low compared to other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with staff, good placements in the past few years also, and really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Open Wi-Fi is available in all departments of college. There are a number of labs here. Classrooms are also quite good. All the departments have their own libraries. Although the campus is quite big. There are number of gardens and ground to hill and relax. Dispensary is also available here. There are several canteens here, or we can say that every department has a canteen. There are much opportunities for sports and cultural activities. Hostel mess food is so good compared to other college host...

reviews.review_heading: The review of CT Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite impressive and spacious. There are multiple libraries available, all of which are clean and stocked with a variety of books. The campus has five canteens, and the food quality is good and affordable.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure in ECE department.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of CT Group of Institutions is very good. I live in the hostel where the security is very tight as outsiders are not allowed in the campus. All the other facilities like Wi-Fi, AC, etc. are available in our college. Medical facilities are good in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Life at CT college for B.Tech CSE.
reviews.review_text: There are two research labs with Wi-Fi whole campus covered with Wi-Fi but not very fast speed. Classrooms are very large and with projectors but not with smartboards. There are two hostels which is very good and quality of food provide by mess and canteen is average.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Laboratories are excellent. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Hostel is very good. The food served in the mess is average. Canteen is also available. The food quality is like 5-star hotels. Our campus is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Best place to learn and improve yourself.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities which were provided by the institution like computers labs in which Wi-Fi access was given to every student. Apart from this, there were 3 libraries for students. Bus services were also given to the students. Classes on personality developments were also available to enhance the skills of students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good for studying purposes. The campus is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very large. Our college has a sports ground. Students can play every game in our college like basketball, football, volleyball, cricket, and badminton. Our college has many buildings.

reviews.review_heading: I'm totally satisfied with faculty, infrastructure and everything.
reviews.review_text: Our college campus infrastructure is great. They provide almost everything in labs. Classrooms are good. There are two libraries in the college and all books are available. Hostel facilities are good. They provide good food and snacks on time. There are 7 canteens available on campus. Where you can eat delicious food and snacks.

reviews.review_heading: CT, Shahpur in brief. All the goods and bads.
reviews.review_text: This was great. A good part of the college was my hostel life. It was fun, clean and rules are greatly implemented. Warden is friendly and there is no drug use atleast not on the ground floor, if you know what I mean? Still a great, hostel food is okay. Not hotel types.

reviews.review_heading: Review of CT Institute of Engineering, Management and Technology.
reviews.review_text: In our college, facilities are average. Food is good for health, and the sports ground is well-maintenance. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and labs are also well-developed. The library has all books regarding the course.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There were many facilities provided in the campus like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms were really good and airy. Wi-Fi was so strong. You can connect to Wi-Fi all over the campus. Canteen was also available there. You can play any sport there in which you were interested.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and support for students who have good talents and skills.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms and hostels are modern, spacious and well ventilated, and they are also well furnished. The canteen is also great with good food, and the auditorium is the best facility of our college infrastructure. There are sports ground, many lawns and parks in the surroundings of our college, along with greenery.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best institutes for studies as well as extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. All classrooms are ventilated. Full range Wi-Fi facility is available in labs, library and classrooms. There are many computers in the library for students to research, and several books are available related to each department. Some general knowledge book, magazines and newspapers are also available in the library. Power backup is available here. Our college offers a clean and healthy environment. Hostels are maintained with all kind of facilities. Our...

reviews.review_heading: Nice college but have very strict rules to follow.
reviews.review_text: Firstly, the hostel, the building is good, the rooms are nice, they have a facility of rooms with fans, cooler, and AC. But the things that are most important are food served by them, they have different dishes for different days, but the quality of the food is very bad, everyday students complain about the food. But the hostel has free high-speed Wi-Fi and also the facility of the gym. The infrastructure of the college is good, classrooms are spacious and well lit, every department has a projec...

individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely dissatisfied.

content.Infrastructure: Facilities in our department include a laboratory and a library. The quality of facilities in the hostel is poor, but the food is good. The canteen is good, but the prices are not fair for the food. Some items are not available in the canteen.

Around 4 students got internships from the IT course at Auroitech, 2 of them from ECE, and 5 from the CSE department. Around 20 students got placed in the mechanical department.

College of Engineering cutoff 2025 across different exams, courses, rounds, and categories. Further updates are provided below:

K.L.N. College of Engineering TANCET cutoff 2025 is out for admission to the MCA course. The Round 1 cutoff for MCA admission is 1219 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 1582; whereas in 2023, the cutoff rank stood at 882 for the General AI quota. Comparing the latest year's first-round cutoff with the past two years, a fluctuating trend can be seen for MCA admission.

K.L.N. College of Engineering MCA cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1. The cutoff was released across different categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the TANCET first-round cutoff Rank stood at 1219 for MCA admission.

Among the OBC category students, the TANCET 2025 cutoff for admission to the MCA course is 1574 under the AI quota. To view the cutoff details for other categories and rounds, aspirants can use the provided filters:

K.L.N. College of Engineering accepts the Tamil Nadu Common Entrance Test (TANCET) ranks, followed by a counselling process for admitting students to the MBA course. Candidates interested in taking admission to this institute must refer to the table below to check out the TANCET 2025 important dates to be eligible for admission.

Tamil Nadu Common Entrance Test (TANCET) is a state-level entrance test for MBA and MCA courses in the colleges of Tamil Nadu. College of Engineering.

Students can view the K.L.N. College of Engineering BTech cutoff for 2025, as well as the cutoff details for 2024 and 2023 across various rounds, categories, and branches. College of Engineering was B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, with a cutoff rank of 52908.

individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for various courses at Jagannath University Haryana?
overview_faqs.answer: As it is a private university fees of this university may be higher as compared to several Government university.For any bachelor/undergraduate programs like B.Tech, BBA, BCA, etc. the fees ranges from Rs.60,000 to Rs.1,20,000 and for master degree programme like M.Tech, MBA, MCA, etc. the fees ranges from Rs.80,000 to Rs.2,00000. It is the approximate fees of these course, You are adviced to contact with the college reception to get the exact fees structure of the different courses.The fees for professional courses like B.Tech, MBA tend to be higher than general degree courses, and there is a hike in fees of this university every year. If any students need to opt any hostel and mess facilitues they have to pay extra for that as they state to pay them.

overview_faqs.question: How good is Jagannath University Haryana?
overview_faqs.answer: As per the NIRF report, Jagannath University placement percentage is between 75-80%. Jagannath University has been accredited with Grade 'B' by the National Assessment and Accreditation Council and is also a member of the Association of Indian Universities. The eligibility criteria for admission to this University is 10+2 examination with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of the Chemistry /Biotechnology / Biology / Technical Vocational subjects. Students must obtain at least 45% marks (40% in the case of candidates belonging to the SC/ST category) in the above subjects taken together.The average salary package offered here is 5.50 Lakhs to 4.80 Lakhs per annum. Top recruiters are - Kotak Mahindra Bank, Development Consultant, Arkiplan International etc.

faqs.question: When will CAT results be announced for MBA admission?
faqs.answer: Common Admission is a national-level MBA entrance exam to get admission into Indian B-Schools. CAT registration takes place in August and it ends in September. Usually, admit cards are released in October and the exam takes place in November every year. Results are declared by January. Based on CAT results, students can apply to multiple B-Schools.

faqs.question: When will Jagannath University cutoff release?
faqs.answer: Jagannath University will release its admission cutoff based on the entrance examination it conducts, the Jagan Nath University Entrance Test (JUEE) or the Common University Entrance Test (CUET), whichever is applicable for your program. The university will then release its own cutoff list on its official website.

faqs.question: How is BTech admission process in Jagannath University Haryana 2025?
faqs.answer: Jagannath University BTech admission process 2025 is simple. First you check eligibility that is if you have passed Class 12 with PCM and atleast 45%. Then, apply through JEE, CUET or JUEE or also directly based on merit. The merit scored in the qualifying exam is considered. After that, fill application form online to start the process. If selected, attend counselling and finish document verification in campus.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for MBA admission at Jagannath University, Haryana in 2025?
faqs.answer: Selection Criteria for MBA programme at Jagannath University, Haryana in 2025 is based on a candidate's performance in entrance exams such asCAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, ATMA, orCUET-PG. Applicants must also meet theminimum eligibility requirement of 50% aggregate marks in their UG. Admissions are conducted primarily on afirst-come, first-served basis.So early application is advisable.

faqs.question: What are the courses offered at Jagannath University?
faqs.answer: The university offers UG, PG, PhD, Diploma and Certificate courses in the areas of Engineering and Technology, Architecture, Management & Commerce, Law, Journalism and Mass Communication, Physiotherapy, Agriculture Science, Education and Vocational Studies.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by Jagannath University Haryana for admission?
faqs.answer: Hello friend,You should mention the degree and  specification in which you want to get admission. There are different examination for those specific programs. If we are talking about MBA then they accept scores of CAT (Common Admission Test),MAT (Management Aptitude Test)XAT (Xavier Aptitude Test)CMAT (Common Management Admission Test).You have to score good rank in any of the above mentioned examination.Other than this you have JUEE which is conducted by University itself. You can also take admission by attempting JUEE.Hope this help.

placement_data.title: Jagannath University Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: The University has not released the 2023 placement statistics yet. However, the NIRF report 2023 has been released. As per the report, 218 UG and 84 PG students were placed during Jagannath University Bahadurgarh placements 2022. The median package offered to UG (4-year) students was INR 3.65 LPA. For UG (3-year) and U (5-year) courses, the median package stood at INR 3.05 LPA and INR 3.35 LPA , respectively. On the other hand, the median package for PG courses ranged between INR 3.70 LPA and INR 4.15 LPA during Jagannath University placements 2022 .

faqs.question: How many students are placed during Jagannath University placements?
faqs.answer: Of all the courses, UG (3-year) courses recorded the highest number of students placed during the 2022 drive. Out of 592 UG (3-year) graduates, 194 were placed and 53 students opted for higher studies during 2022 placements. faqs.question: How are the placements at Jagannath University campus?
faqs.answer: For popular courses like UG (4-year) and UG (3-year), the median package has improved slightly from 2020 to 2022 placements. Out of 65 UG (4-year) students, 10 were placed in the 2022 drive. Further, 194 out of 592 UG (3-year) students were placed during 2022 placements. faqs.question: How are MBA placements at Jagannath University Haryana?
faqs.answer: Hey buddy, The placement cell in Jagannath University claims to have a good placement record. As per my research the highest salary package offered for MBA graduates ranges from 10 to 12 LPA. And the average package is 6 lakh which is claimed by Jagannath University. There are some well known recruiting companies like PGI, HDFC Bank, Infosys, Airtel and some others. The placement records varies each year. The university tries it's best to offer high package. That's all from my side.

faqs.question: How much is the total BTech fee at Jagannath University Haryana?
faqs.answer: The total BTech fee in Jagannath University Haryana comes around INR 3.56 L to 5.4 L approximately The fee can be more or less depending on which specialisation student is taking. Also, tuition fee is generally paid at start of academic year. Apart from tuition fee, the total fee may include hostel charges, lab charges or other miscallenous charges.

faqs.question: Is pursuing MBA at Jagannath University Haryana expensive?
faqs.answer: If you belong to an upper-middle-class family then the expenses are not too much for you but if you belong to a lower-middle-class family then it can be a bit expensive for you. The first-year fee for MBA is approximately INR 1.15 lac. Also, if you are a residence of another state, then it can be really expensive for you. As you can't get a scholarship from your state. Although you can take scholarships offered by central organizations. But there are many criteria for that. Hope you find it helpful.

faqs.question: What is the fees for various courses at Jagannath University Haryana?
faqs.answer: As it is a private university fees of this university may be higher as compared to several Government university. For any bachelor/undergraduate programs like B.Tech, BBA, BCA, etc. the fees ranges from Rs.60,000 to Rs.1,20,000 and for master degree programme like M.Tech, MBA, MCA, etc. the fees ranges from Rs.80,000 to Rs.2,00000. It is the approximate fees of these course, You are adviced to contact with the college reception to get the exact fees structure of the different courses. The fees for professional courses like B.Tech, MBA tend to be higher than general degree courses, and there is a hike in fees of this university every year. If any students need to opt any hostel and mess facilitues they have to pay extra for that as they state to pay them.

faqs.question: What are extra charges included in BSc programme fee at Jagannath University, Haryana in 2025?
faqs.answer: The total Jagannath University Fee amount may include other charges, if applicable. A one-time admission payment is also charged by the university. Hostel charges if applicable is charged along with admission charges. Whereas, the total tuition fee is paid at the beginning of each academic year.

hostel_campus.college_name: Jagannath University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The hostel rooms are spacious, well furnished and are provided with 24 hours internet facility, electricity and water supply. WI-FI facility for hostel residents is provided round the clock for easy access of information and studies. Gym and Mess facilities are also available in hostels.

library.description: Fully air-conditioned laboratory computerized using DELNET and MANUPATRA membership. The library has a special collection of prescribed textbooks called ‘Book Bank’. The library provides the latest research and reference material in print and audio-visual formats along with the facility to refer to e-journals, CDs, Project Reports, Government Publications, Reports and Newsletters. The library is being strengthened through digitization to provide access to MOOC and other online courses.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volley Ball Court, Table Tennis Room, Athletics Tracks, Hockey Field, Chess and Carom Room

reviews.review_heading: The college infra and all things are good but canteen and hostel food is below average
reviews.review_text: The infra is good and labs are average in this university. There is free unlimited Wi-Fi, modern labs and a library in which we can issue books to use.

reviews.review_heading: A bachelor's degree in my life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. It has a Wi-Fi campus, AC classrooms, smart classes, and well-furnished labs for every subject. The canteen and Nestled cafeteria are provided on the campus. Annual sports are also organised at the university level every year.

reviews.review_heading: The education is good, but the infrastructure could be more good.
reviews.review_text: In my BPT course, we design machines related to our course, along with an OPD and labs for different subjects, such as the exercise therapy lab and anatomy lab. The college provides well-equipped hostels for both girls and boys, and there is a mess that provides three meals a day and snacks in the evening. The university annually organizes a sports meet, which lasts for three continuous days for intra-university students, along with various games.

reviews.review_heading: Jagannath - The best college.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good and reliable for both students and teachers. Our faculty members of Jagannath are very helpful and friendly with us. They help us a lot in our studies and even give us extra classes. I didn't opt for the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Fair exams and studies, but dissatisfied because of no activities and opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not strong. The labs are okay and properly equipped. Classrooms have ACs that never work. The library never has the books needed. They neither have novels nor course-related books. Hostel food is okay. No AC in the hostels. Recently, they put coolers after so many complaints from students.

reviews.review_heading: JNU Jhajjar details about MPT course.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available, including classrooms, laboratories, libraries, gyms, swimming pools, and Wi-Fi. The quality of the food in the mess is just okay, not great. Medical facilities are good; there are many labs for physiotherapy treatment. Sports and games are held annually there at the university.

reviews.review_heading: Life at Jagan Nath University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is large enough. There are different buildings for the different courses. The classrooms are also good for 80–85 students. Wi-Fi is available in every corner of the university. The library is on two floors and around 900–1200 books are available in the library. The hostel facility is also available at the university and there are different buildings for girls and boys hostels. The food is good and they give 4 meals a day to the students that live in the hoste...

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with faculty members of this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms are clean and the environment is also good. The food provided by the hostel staff is quite impressive and tasty. Cleaners are provided to clean the rooms before the students get back to the hostel. Warden of the hostel is good and very friendly with students.

reviews.review_heading: It is fruitful for a UG student due to its moderate fee structure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities available on the campus are good. The campus has 3 labs and 1 library, and you can spend most of the time in the library and labs because students are allowed to avail it anytime. The college is far from Delhi, so it is very hectic for one to travel on a daily basis, but you can reside in the hostel provided.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jagannath University Bahadurgarh.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility rarely worked on the campus, and we almost complained about it every day, and there was no response. Classrooms were good and well-designed, but the orientation of the structure is too bad. The campus is air-conditioned. Taking a journey for hours from Delhi to study is still a nightmare.

reviews.review_heading: I don't want to say anything.
reviews.review_text: No this university not provide us anything. They have a computer lab but without a computer they taking a designing classes but without a software also have a camera without a sensor. But faculty is too good no doubt on that part seriously they are the Best.

reviews.review_heading: Jagannath university is best for education.
reviews.review_text: Entire college is connected to a Wi-Fi network. All classrooms are fully air conditioned. And has also got a big sports ground with facility of all the sports and their is a gym also for fitness lovers. In the canteen the quality and taste of food is very good. And the hostels are very near to the university.

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied because of opportunities provided on-campus.
reviews.review_text: The campus is fully enabled with Wi-Fi. Labs are maintained properly as all the required labs for each department are available there. The library is always open for students, and even students have their library cards with which they can get books for some days. Quality food is served at the canteen. Infrastructure is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Once we were dissatisfied with them.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of campus is nice. They have two buildings in that they have separate department for course and cafeteria. Ground for volleyball. Basketball cricket n many more. They have a very nice hostel with good food n good facilities nice labs.

reviews.review_heading: Study is good in college.
reviews.review_text: All over building is okay. Classrooms are normal same as government colleges. Library is good. We get all the books which we required related to subjects. There is AC also in computer lab and library. There are two Computer lab. Quality is good. Canteen is not good. Only Small dairy products are there.

college_info.college_name: Jagannath University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: As it is a private university fees of this university may be higher as compared to several Government university.

For any bachelor/undergraduate programs like B.Tech, BBA, BCA, etc. the fees ranges from Rs.60,000 to Rs.1,20,000 and for master degree programme like M.Tech, MBA, MCA, etc. the fees ranges from Rs.80,000 to Rs.2,00000. It is the approximate fees of these course, You are adviced to contact with the college reception to get the exact fees structure of the different courses.

The fees for professional courses like B.Tech, MBA tend to be higher than general degree courses, and there is a hike in fees of this university every year. If any students need to opt any hostel and mess facilitues they have to pay extra for that as they state to pay them.
To encourage its bright students, Jagannath University offers various categories of scholarships.

The merit-based scholarships for BCom students at Jagannath University, Haryana are awarded based on the candidate's performance in the qualifying examination (Class 12). The university has a tier system:
Students securing above 90% marks in Class 12 receive a 35% tuition fee scholarship.
Those scoring between 80% and 90% are eligible for a 25% tuition fee concession.
Students with scores ranging from 70% to 80% can avail a 10% tuition fee scholarship.
Even those with marks between 60% and 70% are granted a 5% tuition fee concession.

Based on the information available on the university official website the university follows the UGC guideline to refund the fees to the students. It is mentioned in the terms and condition of the refund ploicy of the University "4.1. 3 If a student chooses to withdraw from the programme of study in which he/she is enrolled, the institution concerned shall follow the following five-tier system for the refund of fees* remitted by the student" .

reviews_list.review_title: Below Average Institution .

review_content.Placements: I am currently studying in the college and I have been in touch with the seniors. They said that there is very less scope for learning and there is the lack of practical approach in the students. No placement facility is there and only the local companies hire that too for sales role.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi connectivity and the course is thoroughly based on mugging up the theory and no practical approches are taught to the students. Hostel is okay and not very good. Lack of cleanliness and there is no place for sports or games in the curriculum.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good facilities.

review_content.Placements: Many students got placed in many companies. All students got off placements. Only one company visited our college for placements, which was Tech Mahindra. Students got job opportunities through AKTU official site. It was helpful. Placements were not good in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: All labs and library facilities were quite good and systematic. The hostel had a good environment. The food served in the mess was not satisfactory, good, and healthy. Our canteen provided good snacks to eat.
review_content.Faculty: All teachers were helpful and supportive. They had not taught us practically. Some of them did only politics in college. Semester exams were difficult but were always from learned topics. The course curriculum should provide practical knowledge for students to make them industry-ready.

review_summary.college_name: Rajarshi Rananjay Sinh Institute of Management and Technology (RRSIMT) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure of RRSIMT Amethi is very good. Teachers are helpful and good instructors.

content.Placements: Placement rate was below average. Around 10% of students got placed by campus placement. The highest salary package offered was 3.50 LPA. The minimum salary offered was Rs 80,000 per month. Top recruiting companies mostly local companies and very small pvt ltd companies were come for recruiting. In the view of placements, this college was not more suitable. But we could try better to get placed.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of Rajarshi Rananjay Singh Institute of Management and Technology was very good. Computer labs were air-conditioned and classrooms were well-ventilated. A big library was available with all important books and magazines. Canteen and medical facilities were provided. Sports and games facilities were available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty, infrastructure and facilities but placements should improve.

content.Placements: Top recruiting companies include TCS, HCL, and Wipro. The percentage of placed students in my course was only 30-35%. Placements depend on the students. If students are not punctual and fully dependent on the college, then placements are difficult. RRSIMT is the best college in the Amethi district.
content.Infrastructure: RRSIMT has very good infrastructure, and the campus is very clean. There is a hostel facility on campus, and other hostels are available at a very low cost. The hostel infrastructure is good, and the security on campus and in the hostels is very good.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Below Average Institution .

content.Placements: I am currently studying in the college and I have been in touch with the seniors. They said that there is very less scope for learning and there is the lack of practical approach in the students. No placement facility is there and only the local companies hire that too for sales role.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi connectivity and the course is thoroughly based on mugging up the theory and no practical approches are taught to the students. Hostel is okay and not very good. Lack of cleanliness and there is no place for sports or games in the curriculum.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good facilities.

content.Placements: Many students got placed in many companies. All students got off placements. Only one company visited our college for placements, which was Tech Mahindra. Students got job opportunities through AKTU official site. It was helpful. Placements were not good in our college.
content.Infrastructure: All labs and library facilities were quite good and systematic. The hostel had a good environment. The food served in the mess was not satisfactory, good, and healthy. Our canteen provided good snacks to eat.
content.Faculty: All teachers were helpful and supportive. They had not taught us practically. Some of them did only politics in college. Semester exams were difficult but were always from learned topics. The course curriculum should provide practical knowledge for students to make them industry-ready.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of placements and infrastructure of this college.

content.Placements: Placements are not good because only 2–3 startups come to this college. They offer a salary of Rs. 5000 per month to Rs. 15000 per month. Mostly, IT startups come to this college. No companies offer internships. Only 5% to 10% of students are placed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is not good because the whole campus is situated in a small building. There is no Wi-Fi facility in the hostel. The mess food is very oily. The canteen only serves chain, samosas, namkeen, and biscuits.

admission_process.title: Rajarshi Rananjay Sinh Institute of Management and Technology (RRSIMT) Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Rajarshi Rananjay Sinh Institute of Management and Technology (RRSIMT) admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Rajarshi Rananjay Sinh Institute of Management and Technology (RRSIMT)offers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 1,82,100 - 2,44,800. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 3 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

faqs.question: Does Govindrao Wanjari College of Engineering and Technology, Nagpur provide good placement facilities?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Govindrao Wanjari College of Engineering and Technology, Nagpur is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Shri Hanuman Vyayam Prasarak Mandal, College of Engineering and Technology is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The fee structure for the Shri Hanuman Vyayam Prasarak Mandal, College of Engineering and Technology programmes is around INR 1,04,348 to 3,27,172.

faqs.answer: A:    Shri Hanuman Vyayam Prasarak Mandal, College of Engineering and Technology offers Degree courses including 5 UG and 5 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Shri Hanuman Vyayam Prasarak Mandal, College of Engineering and Technology has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Information Technology, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Electronics Engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good in all aspects except for placements and knowledge shared.

review_content.Placements: The college provided us with the placement opportunities, but they should bring trustworthy companies for students because most of the companies that visited here only offered the call letter, but they didn't let the students join in their organisations. They should provide industry exposure and projects for the students to gain good experience.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. We have a library with ample books. The college also provides many other facilities like reading room, computer lab, and many others. The campus atmosphere was good. We also have a playground available here. But they should provide facilities like gym and swimming pool for free of cost.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, placements, infrastructure, and facilities.

review_content.Placements: I completed my engineering from HVPM College of Engineering and Technology in 2014. Around 80% of the students got placed from our college. The highest package offered for the students of our batch was 4 LPA, and the lowest was 1.5 LPA. Companies like TCS, Zensor, and Cognizant, etc., visited the campus for placements. Most of the students were offered roles such as software developer and some roles in software testing and database domains. Mostly the students who score well in academics are offered placement opportunities. The placement cell is actively working to provide better placement opportunities for students. Every year they receive feedbacks from our students about their success.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.

faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

overview_faqs.question: Is Shri Hanuman Vyayam Prasarak Mandal, College of Engineering and Technology a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Shri Hanuman Vyayam Prasarak Mandal, College of Engineering and Technology is a reputed institute for B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Shri Hanuman Vyayam Prasarak Mandal, College of Engineering and Technology has a review rating of 3.4 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.8 on campuslife, 2.8 on placements, 3.4 on faculty and 3.6 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is good because of good teachers and infrastructure.

content.Placements: About 50% of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 1.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Wipro, TCS and Infosys visit our campus for placements. About 90% of the students from our course got an internship. I got a team lead role in our class.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides awesome facilities. The infrastructure of our college is well-maintained. There are 4 types of courses in our college. Our college provides labs and a library. The college provides a hostel facility. The quality of food served in the canteen and mess is good. Medical facilities, sports clubs and games are available here.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: No proper faculty, infrastructure, no placement guarantee. Risk your graduation.

content.Placements: You need to be very concise and shuttle in academics to get placed. Focus on skills. Its bit rare to get placed with a package above 3 L. Various skills enhancing projects and activities will be there but it's on you how you get advantage of that. Placement cell is helpful only if you go according to their rules and proceedings. I would give 4 out of 10 for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Below average. They should use funds properly to make students avail the required infrastructure and equipments. Facilities need to be worked on. Orientation towards sports and social work is good. Campus is not big enough to have everything as per engineering type of events. 5 out of 10.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: The college is good in all aspects except for placements and knowledge shared.

content.Placements: The college provided us with the placement opportunities, but they should bring trustworthy companies for students because most of the companies that visited here only offered the call letter, but they didn't let the students join in their organisations. They should provide industry exposure and projects for the students to gain good experience.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. We have a library with ample books. The college also provides many other facilities like reading room, computer lab, and many others. The campus atmosphere was good. We also have a playground available here. But they should provide facilities like gym and swimming pool for free of cost.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, placements, infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Placements: I completed my engineering from HVPM College of Engineering and Technology in 2014. Around 80% of the students got placed from our college. The highest package offered for the students of our batch was 4 LPA, and the lowest was 1.5 LPA. Companies like TCS, Zensor, and Cognizant, etc., visited the campus for placements. Most of the students were offered roles such as software developer and some roles in software testing and database domains. Mostly the students who score well in academics are offered placement opportunities. The placement cell is actively working to provide better placement opportunities for students. Every year they receive feedbacks from our students about their success.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Overall, I would rate 8 out of 10 for the college.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are not much good. The placement percentage is not good as we aspect. Our college management says to us that they are focusing on placements and student learning. The placement cell is progressive. They told us that, this year, the placement percentage is on the upper margin compared to last year, but it is not 100%. Some small companies visited our college and hired students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not good compared to other colleges in our city. If I talk about learning in the college, then our college is better than the other colleges because every faculty member in the college is very good. Sports events are held by our college for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is good because of good teachers and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides awesome facilities. The infrastructure of our college is well-maintained. There are 4 types of courses in our college. Our college provides labs and a library. The college provides a hostel facility. The quality of food served in the canteen and mess is good. Medical facilities, sports clubs and games are available here.

reviews.review_heading: No proper faculty, infrastructure, no placement guarantee. Risk your graduation.
reviews.review_text: Below average. They should use funds properly to make students avail the required infrastructure and equipments. Facilities need to be worked on. Orientation towards sports and social work is good. Campus is not big enough to have everything as per engineering type of events. 5 out of 10.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good in all aspects except for placements and knowledge shared.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. We have a library with ample books. The college also provides many other facilities like reading room, computer lab, and many others. The campus atmosphere was good. We also have a playground available here. But they should provide facilities like gym and swimming pool for free of cost.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, placements, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The campus is huge, and they provide facilities like Wi-Fi facilities, medical facilities, cafeteria, playground, gym facilities, yoga, and swimming pools etc. HVPM provides physical education to their all students, and they also conduct self-defence classes for girls. The quality of labs and classrooms was very good. There is a huge auditorium that can accommodate 1000 students.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I would rate 8 out of 10 for the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not good compared to other colleges in our city. If I talk about learning in the college, then our college is better than the other colleges because every faculty member in the college is very good. Sports events are held by our college for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is an awesome college in Amaravati.
reviews.review_text: HVPM college provides a strict and secure environment for girls. It is one the best colleges. The best Wi-Fi routers are installed on the campus. Good parking facilities and a playground are provided. Overall, the college is awesome.

reviews.review_heading: Very much dissatisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: They provide basic facilities to the students. All the classes have good benches. The projector is there in all the classes with a digital board. The library is not too big, but there are always books available in the library as a student like us never issue a book, and the annual event always been a fun moment.

review_content.Placements: More than 85% of students got placed in this course. The highest salary package offered was 12 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, etc. Students who score 8 CGPA are eligible for recruitment.

review_summary.college_name: GRT Institute of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Very good infrastructure, excellent facilities and placements.

content.Placements: The percentage of the placements is good, as 75% of students were placed in various companies like TCS, Zoho, and many other companies. The minimum average package of the placements is 4.4 LPA and the maximum is 1.4 CPA. For the students, from the 3rd year onwards, they provide internships.
content.Infrastructure: The great infrastructure makes students comfortable with nature and the study aspect. In each department, they have various facilities in labs, classrooms, and the library. The hostel was good enough compared to other colleges, as they provide rooms for 4 to 5 members.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: About my college experience.

content.Placements: In my course, the final years were placed a little less, due to lack of placement training, a little, and of course recession. The highest package was about 12 LPA and the lowest was 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies here are TCS, Cognizant, Accenture, and CTS. Very less students got noticeable internships, some internships are arranged by the college itself. The top roles offered in the course are software engineer, test analyst, data engineer, CEO, and more.
content.Infrastructure: For our course, we have decent classrooms. The lab facilities are pretty okay, and the library is one of the places where you can gain something useful and it is good here, hostel accommodation is pretty good, but there's a time limit for the usage of phones. It will be collected after 8:30 which is one of the main drawbacks I find here, but use can get permission for a laptop and use it, and the food quality is good and better comparing the surrounding campuses.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of GRT Institute of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: More than 85% of students got placed in this course. The highest salary package offered was 12 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, etc. Students who score 8 CGPA are eligible for recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in this college. There is a decent library on our campus. Separate laboratories are available for different departments. Digital boards are available in our classrooms. The food quality is decent.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good infrastructure and teachers.

content.Placements: Placements provided in our college are good. Placement officer tries to provide placements from good companies and gives some coaching to crack all the aptitude exams. They improve the knowledge of students in both the hardware and software sectors.
content.Infrastructure: There are many systems with internet access. The quality of the food served in the hostel and canteen is very good. It has a big ground for students to play all the games.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are helpful to students in their studies and support them in extracurricular activities. They improve the knowledge of students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The college is like a book in a jungle as it is a great campus which is in a rural area.

content.Placements: Mostly, IT companies and some internship-providing companies will arrive at our college. About 70% of students were placed in the college. The highest salary offered is Rs.100000 per month, the average salary offered is Rs.20000 per month, and the lowest salary offered is Rs.11000 per month. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, HCL, and CTS.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very nice and all the lab facilities are provided. Mostly, the systematic lab contains an air-conditioner. Wi-Fi is provided for faculty members only and also the final year students can also use when their project work is undergoing. Food is of average taste in mess and canteen is also there now. They are going to open a bakery and also a juice park, etc. The classrooms are very wide with a good ventilation facility.

hostel_campus.college_name: GRT Institute of Engineering and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The hostel comes with 75 rooms for girls and 124 for boys, are spacious, clean and secure. Entitling each student to an individual bed, wardrobe, armchair and desk. Air-conditioned and non air-conditioned rooms are available on an individual/sharing basis. The hostel has separate recreation, study and visitor’s rooms, apart from a TV room and international standard gym. The hostel boasts of a 10 Mbps, WI-FI powered computer room.

library.description: The library also houses over 2500 reference and rare books on all branches of engineering, science, the humanities, English, dictionaries and encyclopedias. The audiovisual section of the college library consists of over 1000 CD/DVD-ROM diskettes; enabling students improve their communications skills and prepare for the competitive exams. Around 217 IEEE, ASME, ASCE and J-GATE e-Journals and 62 national journals are subscribed to at the library, including technical and non technical magazines..

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab

reviews.review_heading: Very good infrastructure, excellent facilities and placements.
reviews.review_text: The great infrastructure makes students comfortable with nature and the study aspect. In each department, they have various facilities in labs, classrooms, and the library. The hostel was good enough compared to other colleges, as they provide rooms for 4 to 5 members.

reviews.review_heading: About my college experience.
reviews.review_text: For our course, we have decent classrooms. The lab facilities are pretty okay, and the library is one of the places where you can gain something useful and it is good here, hostel accommodation is pretty good, but there's a time limit for the usage of phones. It will be collected after 8:30 which is one of the main drawbacks I find here, but use can get permission for a laptop and use it, and the food quality is good and better comparing the surrounding campuses.

reviews.review_heading: Review of GRT Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in this college. There is a decent library on our campus. Separate laboratories are available for different departments. Digital boards are available in our classrooms. The food quality is decent.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and teachers.
reviews.review_text: There are many systems with internet access. The quality of the food served in the hostel and canteen is very good. It has a big ground for students to play all the games.

reviews.review_heading: The college is like a book in a jungle as it is a great campus which is in a rural area.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very nice and all the lab facilities are provided. Mostly, the systematic lab contains an air-conditioner. Wi-Fi is provided for faculty members only and also the final year students can also use when their project work is undergoing. Food is of average taste in mess and canteen is also there now. They are going to open a bakery and also a juice park, etc.  The classrooms are very wide with a good ventilation facility.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good infrastructure and good faculty for teaching. It is a good place to acquire knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Our college is located in the middle of a highway, and it has huge coverage of the area. It has A, B, C, D and E blocks with canteen. Our college provides both girls and boys hostel, B.Ed block, MBA block, nursing block, a huge playground with garden. The quality of the food served is good, and weekly once we get non-vegetarian food. We have a library with Wi-Fi access.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, and I like it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides labs, classroom and library. Canteen facilities are good, but medical facilities are average. Food quality is good. Hostel facilities are average. They also provide food, and facilities of food are clean. There are no games in our college.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides studies with good placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: All students are provided with good labs, classrooms and a library. The mobile phone is strictly prohibited on our campus. PC is available in the library with an internet connection. Medical and sports facilities are very good, but the canteen provides the average quality of food.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of lack of support.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good infrastructure and surroundings. There is a neat playground with some good and supportive ground staff members. Our management doesn't show any interest in playing games which is one of the poor things. The hostel also needs to improve a bit in providing good surroundings and food.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of the faculty and placements. Our college has a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Mobile phones are not allowed on the college premises. There is a huge central library with a separate floor in the management block. The library has computers with high-speed internet for students studies purpose. Every department has a separate library for students.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty members and their teaching.
reviews.review_text: Labs are equipped with all equipment, and we get good knowledge in it. Lab in charge has some good knowledge, so we got good practical knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied for the money paid. It provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a very good infrastructure with a massive playground. There are highly facilitated labs, but we have some restrictions to use for students. Almost books required for students are available in the library including newspapers and magazines. Separate gents and ladies' hostels are available inside the campus. Food served is above average.

reviews.review_heading: Don't waste your 4  years by joining this college.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has an excellent infrastructure and facilities. It has a good environment to learn things. We pay Rs. 10 for Wi-Fi for one-hour unlimited usage. Classrooms are well spaced. The library has a good collection of books and we also have a digital library. The good thing about our campus is the hostel. We have many facilities at a good price while comparing to other colleges. They provide hot water, study tables, drinking water, etc. The food served is average. We have a canteen but they d...

reviews.review_heading: This college has an average academic and good atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in our department include it has its own library. Even our college has a general library for engineering and post-graduation separately, and the classrooms are quite huge and spacious. Labs are nice to gain more practical knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with placements. The college has good infrastructure, hostel and canteen facility.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very wonderful. Classrooms are good, but labs are not that good. The college does not provide Wi-Fi facility. Mobiles and laptops are not allowed in college as well as in the hostel. In the hostel, rooms and food served are good. Medical facilities are available. The college does not provide sports and games facilities for girls in the hostel.

Both inside India & outside India

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sree Dattha Group of Educational Institutions offers Undergraduate, Postgraduate and Diploma programmes across Engineering and Management streams. These courses are offered through various campuses of Sree Dattha Group of Educational Institutions. Candidates can check the Sree Dattha Group of Educational Institutions courses along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table provided below:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Join this college. Placements are average, and faculty can be considered moderate.

review_content.Placements: In our college, placements are available, but we should not over-expect, as they claim 100 percent placement. Many people know it is not possible to provide a job for every student. We do have some average placements. The highest placement is 24 LPA, which is only for one person. Others get general average packages. We need to consider the reality of software companies, as hiring is a bit low right now.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have average infrastructure. We have labs, classrooms, and libraries, each in their respective blocks. There are still ongoing constructions for more classrooms. In the future, it is going to be good for sure. The food is not good at all. Most people dislike it, and the hostel facilities are moderate.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, experienced faculty, high placements.

review_content.Placements: About 89 percent of students got placed with good packages, and there is a 100 percent pass percentage. Many students have been selected by multiple companies. Several companies visit the college regularly, and students also take up internships. There are good campus placement opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are a total of 3 buildings, with labs for every class, the college has a big ground, and the surroundings are very peaceful with no disturbances. A gym is available, along with a sports room for playing games. There are multiple seminar halls and a canteen that offers the best food items at reasonable rates, every classroom is equipped with a CCTV camera.

description: Sree Dattha Group of Educational Institutions cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Sree Dattha Group of Educational Institutions TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 65747 and 100966 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first round, the closing rank f

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering and B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 65747, 88307 and 100966, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Sree Dattha Group of Educational Institutions. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Sree Dattha Group of Educational Institutions MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 35519. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 29891, and the 2023 cutoff was 41159 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been fluctuating in the last 3 years.

reviews.review_heading: Awesome college I have ever seen.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent. Our campus is big. Many facilities are available in this college. Classrooms are well-maintained. The laboratory is better. reviews.review_heading: Pages Torn from the Sree Dattha Student's Diary
reviews.review_text: Good facilities are provided, and the infrastructure is great, including high-speed internet WiFi, fully equipped computer labs, wide classrooms, and an excellent library. The hostel is okay and cleaned every day, with 24-hour water supply for drinking and usage. Delicious food is served in the mess and canteen. All items are available in the canteen, including chicken biryani. There is a 24-hour RMP doctor available for medical emergencies. Sports and games are held twice weekly.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, providing a nice environment. Labs are well-equipped. A well-stocked library is present on campus, and all academic books are available in the library. The hostel facility is good, and the mess food quality is also good. Our campus has limited sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good facility with a good and healthy atmosphere.
