The canteen also has good facilities and serves all categories of food, snacks, bakery items, cool drinks and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college and good placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. The whole campus is WI-FI-enabled. There is a lab for every subject. The lab has all the equipment and many computers and all the labs are air-conditioned. Our college has a well-stocked library, and all books are available.

faqs.question: Q: Is Kavikulguru Institute of Technology and Science a good college/Institute?

faqs.answer: Yes, in Kavikulguru Institute of Technology and Science students can get admission directly through management seat. This institute is very particular about its management quota admissions and controls it up to 20% of the full capacity. For the same, one needs to have passed the set exam of 10+2 having minimum 45% marks in Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics. Direct admission depends on the merit of the candidate in the qualifying examination for the course. The seats under management quota cost between INR 1,20,000/- to INR 1,50,000/- per annum. Every year 100 – 150 direct admission seats are available. Candidates can for direct admission by simply filling the application form and submitting the institute with the required documents.

Not just this, it has also been rated 3.84 on Campus Life, 2.88 on Placements, 4.05 on Faculty and 4.11 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: Is Kavikulguru Institute of Technology and Science a known institute?
overview_faqs.answer: KITS stands for Kavikulguru Institute of Technology and Science, which is a very prestigious institution. It has been in existence since 1997, especially in the state of Maharashtra, India. In fact, it is very reputed for offering quality education in numerous streams of engineering and technology. KITS is affiliated to Rashtrasant Tukadoji Maharaj Nagpur University and offers a range of courses under undergraduate and postgraduate levels. Nevertheless, it is very popular for its excellent academic curriculum, knowledgeable faculty members, and modern infrastructure. In addition, KITS has good placement records. So far, several companies have been inviting the students for campus recruitment. Its thrust on research, innovation, and holistic development for students attracts it to the list of engineering aspirants.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to Kavikulguru Institute of Technology and Science?
faqs.answer: Yes, in Kavikulguru Institute of Technology and Science students can get admission directly through management seat. This institute is very particular about its management quota admissions and controls it up to 20% of the full capacity. For the same, one needs to have passed the set exam of 10+2 having minimum 45% marks in Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics. Direct admission depends on the merit of the candidate in the qualifying examination for the course. The seats under management quota cost between INR 1,20,000/- to INR 1,50,000/- per annum. Every year 100 – 150 direct admission seats are available. Candidates can for direct admission by simply filling the application form and submitting the institute with the required documents.

faqs.question: How to get into Kavikulguru Institute of Technology and Science for UG/PG courses? What's the eligibility for admission?
faqs.answer: As per the admission criteria one has to fulfill the eligibility criteria to get into Kavikulguru Institute of Technology and Science for the UG/ PG courses. For UG courses, the candidate must have passed 10+2 from any recognised University securing the minimum of 45% in PCM. For the PG courses, there will be requirement of bachelor's degree in relevant subject with minimum of 50% of marks. UG Course admission depends on JEE Main or MHT CET score and one gets a chance to study in this college if one gets a rank of 10000 to 50000. For PG courses, candidates have to take GATE or PGECET examination for their selection for the PG courses. It also has management quota seats going for a fees of roughly around INR 1,20 000 to INR 1,50 000 per annum.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities and infrastructure. All classrooms are good. The library is very good. The hostel rooms are not much huge. Around three students can share each hostel room. The mess is not good. Our college has a gym, playgrounds, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Kavikulguru Institute of Technology and Science.
reviews.review_text: Facilities Wi-Fi, water, stationary, and canteen were very good. The food served in the mess was good. Canteen facility was average. Medical facilities were available. Sports and games were also good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college does not provide on-campus placements for students.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is amazing. It is an amazing college for its infrastructure. There are amazing fountains.

reviews.review_heading: There are good infrastructure and facilities here.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good environment and infrastructure. Labs are well-equipped, and Wi-Fi is available on all the campuses. There are awesome facilities in hostels and mess. Clean and hygienic food is served for students every day. There is a huge playground for students to play various sports.

reviews.review_heading: I joined KITS College, and my campus life was amazing.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available, from Wi-Fi to classrooms and library. It has the biggest library in Asia, with a good environment. The hostels are good, and the food provided is also good. Facilities like medical, sports and games are also provided. Computers are available for personal work and projects. Labs are maintained well, and practicals are done.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is good with a lot of trees, and nearby places are also good for hangout.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college has a library for a particular subject. Our college provides labs. The campus is huge and spacious. It has a lot of facilities. Our college provides a gym, indoor stadium, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The college environment is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is awesome. The weather here is very pleasant. The college provides all the facilities like Wi-Fi all over the college and well-equipped labs. The library has thousands of books, and one can go there at any time to read the books. The infrastructure of the hostel is very good. The mess, rooms, and washing area are very well maintained. The hostel rooms are well ventilated, and the mess is also hygienic. The food is good. Medical and gym facilities are also avail...

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and facilities are very good here.
reviews.review_text: There are separate labs for separate batches and good libraries. There are wooden benches in classrooms. Hostel facilities are quite good. They provide delicious breakfast but do not provide delicious lunch and dinner. A dispensary is available inside the campus, and there are both indoor games and outdoor sports.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, and the campus is very nice. Library facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good, and there are good classrooms and separate labs for every subject. The hostel is very nice, but the mess food is not good. However, medical facilities are available for us, and there is a good environment for sports and games. There is a huge playground.

reviews.review_heading: I am highly satisfied and happy to be graduated from this college. It had great placements in 2019.
reviews.review_text: There are 3 labs for the electrical engineering department, 4 labs for the mechanical engineering department, 2 labs for the civil engineering department and 3 labs for computer and technology department. Our campus is enabled with a Wi-Fi facility. There are 2 girls and 2 boys hostels inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: The placement cell of the college is active and faculty is good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good as the college is a very old, reputed college and is very famous in the region. All the departments have their own labs dedicated to them. The library is the best in the Vidarbha region. The quality of hostel is okay and food is okayish.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Kavikulguru Institute of Technology and Science (KITS).
reviews.review_text: The campus is spread over 50 acres with greenery. The infrastructure and other facilities in our college are good. The library is one of the largest in central India with many journals and books. The hostels are well-maintained. Our college has a dispensary and sports complex.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Kavikulguru Institute of Technology and Science

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like TCS, Wipro, Byju's, Capgemini and Yardi visit our college to hire students from our batch.

reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the faculty.

review_content.Placements: 40% of students were placed in our course, with the highest package being 32 LPA and the lowest 4 LPA. Wipro, Accenture, Amazon, and Google are the top companies. About 20% of students got internships in companies like TCS, with software engineer and data scientist being the top roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi works great, classrooms are spacious, and the library is filled with rare books. There is no hostel facility yet, but they may add one later. The canteen is top-notch, medical facilities are available, and sports are taken seriously, with a games period once a week.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied, no placements in the college; infrastructure and facilities are good.

review_content.Placements: Less placements in the EEE course at this college, with the highest package being 2 LPA. Recruiting companies include Amazon and Dell, but internships are very limited, with only 2% of students getting placed this year.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure with well-equipped labs and a decent canteen. Drinking water is kept cool during the summer, and college buses are available for transportation. The faculty are friendly.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are well-qualified and knowledgeable, but the curriculum doesn’t fully prepare students for the industry. Exams are manageable, and the pass percentage was about 90% this year. Success largely depends on individual student effort rather than faculty support.

individual_reviews.title: Everything is poor in our college so it's waste of both time and money.

content.Placements: On average, students get 60-70% in our course of CSE. We don't have proper faculty now, and even placements are poor. I mean, it's very hard to find. I think the best company we get is Wipro, with the highest package of 8 LPA. The average package is 5 LPA, and the lowest package is 2 LPA. We don't have any opportunities right now. The top roles are, at maximum, as a fresher we could get that.
content.Infrastructure: Nothing is available. Even sports aren't available. The canteen isn't available, and medical facilities are okay. I mean, it's average, and we don't have a private mess for students here in our college. We don't have proper faculty or infrastructure. Classrooms are very dirty, and in the library, we don't find proper books.

content.Infrastructure: There are good facilities and also infrastructure. individual_reviews.title: 4 years of graduation in TECB.

Class room, Rooms and Labs are attached with modern technology like digital board AC Answers systems are available. Library is also good all the books available and Reading room is also there. Hostel is absolutely not good at all. No security is there. And the Canteen is also 2KM away from hostel. And no space for playing Games sports nothing is there.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students to take admission.
reviews.review_text: There are special labs for students of all years. Different classrooms and personal computers are provided. Wi-Fi is available 24X7. There are 2 beds in every room in the hostel. It provides cool water and a warden. The canteen serves 3 times meals and tiffin for free.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: There is an adequate number of labs and classrooms for students to carry out any experiments and do mainstream study. All facilities are enough to gather the knowledge. reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for financially weak students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is below average. It is a small campus. Wi-Fi is not available. Classrooms and labs are good. The cafeteria is average. The library is average. The hostel is not good. We play sports and games like volleyball, badminton, cricket, football, and table tennis.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with very helpful faculty members and average placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available, but not for students. It is provided in labs. Labs are good with air conditioning. There are a total of five labs in computer science, each with i5 computers. Classrooms are also good with projectors. The library is average. Mostly, old edition books are available.

reviews.review_heading: TECB is a well-known good college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good ambiance. Free Wi-Fi is available for faculty members and students. Lab are well maintained. Classrooms are quite spacious. Course content books and other reference books are available in the library. The hostel also has Wi-Fi Facility. Food quality is average. An appreciable amount of space is available for sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: It is an underrated college that provides a brilliant career for students.

Hostel facilities are good. The food quality in the canteen is good. Sports and games facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Loyola is a Lovable and memorable college.

content.Placements: More than 100 companies are involved in the placement. There is a 95% percentage of students who were placed in high-paid jobs. Because of the special training for placement provided by our college administration, Athinapandiyan Institute recruits staff for the training in biomedical equipment class; the seniors are placed in this company.
content.Infrastructure: Bio Medical Engineering course is a rare course when I joined this college. But even at that time, there were enough faculty members and equipment provided by the college. Other than hostel life, it's just rocking for us. I am enjoying that time, which is memorable and lovable in Loyola hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This college is very good for students.

content.Placements: Around 92.2% of students got placed in our course. Almost 39% of students got internships in companies like NSE and KCB. The top role offered is design engineering.
content.Infrastructure: In our department, Wi-Fi facility is not good. The laboratory is also not good. It provides a good library. Classrooms are average. Hostel facilities are also good. The food quality is better. The canteen is also not good. Medical facilities are good. Sports are also conducted.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful and experienced. Semester exams are very hard, and the pass percentage is 65%. The teaching quality is good, and we can understand them very well.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: The campus location is just awesome with full greanary.

content.Placements: They will compete 100% placements but only a few of students will get good company remaining all will get only tier-4 or tier-5 company. The basic salary package will be about 1 Lacs per annum to 2.5 Lacs per annum. About internships the students will have to take care of that personally the college management will not provide any additional information about it.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi campus. In fact mobiles are not allowed in the college and in hostel we are treated like prisoners. Very strict, not allowed to go out of campus except on Sunday that to with lot of permission from DCW, warden etc. We cannot be out for more than 4 hrs. or else we have to pay fine for that.

reviews.review_heading: Don't waste your life here because of poor faculty, lack of placements and other issues.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi facilities is provided. Except computer lab, all other labs were below average. Reference related books were very few in the library. There were no separate blocks for each department.

It is an Anna University’s affiliated college where we students didn't get any knowledge about our studies and it's a place where education has been sold for a great value of money. The main motive of our college is to increase the money by getting more number of admissions and so they put us under pressure. We are treated like slaves, instead of engineers. 
Our parents have been brainwashed just by the rules followed in this college and also by the name of the college. reviews.review_heading: It is neither good nor bad. It is just good.
reviews.review_text: There is not much hygiene and taste at my college hostel like other hostels. It is not worth for money. review_content.Placements: TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Accenture, Tata Motors, and John Deere are the companies that come for campus drives. More than 150 students are placed in those companies with a minimum package of 3.5 LPA. Some students are even placed out of the country.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Strong and good placements.

content.Placements: Placements at my college do not work properly. In a batch of 60 students, only 4 to 5 students secure placements in a company. Only 1 or 2 companies visit our college and 5 to 7 students secure placements. 1 company offers a package between 4 LPA to 10 LPA. The packages offered are good and placement levels are poor.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is well-equipped with modern computers, software, and high-speed internet, to support programming, simulation, and design. Classrooms are not good. I don’t live in the hostel, but students say that the food should ideally be nutritious, hygienic, and cater to different dietary preferences. The campus canteen should provide affordable snacks, beverages, and quick meals. Since it's a place where students socialize, there is a clean and comfortable environment with reasonably priced food is essential.

faqs.answer: A:    The salary for BTech Petroleum Engineering freshers in India depends on a lot of factors like academic record, skill set, internship experience, company location, etc. Initially, you can get approximately INR 4 LPA to INR 6 LPA after completing the BTech Petroleum Engg. course. As you earn a few years of experience in the field, you can easily earn between INR 6 LPA and INR 10 LPA at the mid-senior level. For senior-level positions, the salary can go up to INR 15 LPA. faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.
faqs.question: Q: What is the scope of MBA?

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.
faqs.question: Q: What is covered in Machine Design subject in B.Tech course?

overview_faqs.question: What is the average starting salary for BTech Petroleum Engineering graduates?
overview_faqs.answer: The salary for BTech Petroleum Engineering freshers in India depends on a lot of factors like academic record, skill set, internship experience, company location, etc. Initially, you can get approximately INR 4 LPA to INR 6 LPA after completing the BTech Petroleum Engg. course. As you earn a few years of experience in the field, you can easily earn between INR 6 LPA and INR 10 LPA at the mid-senior level. For senior-level positions, the salary can go up to INR 15 LPA. Recruiters pay more to people who have the right set of skills and experience and help in their business growth.Know more about -Petroleum Engineering Courses

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: Bikaner Technical University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sobhasaria Group of Institutions.

content.Placements: There are about 5000 students studying in this institution, and 20% of students are placed in my course, B.Tech AIML (CSE). The lowest package is 6 LPA, and the highest package is 15 to 20 LPA. Companies include Infosys, TCS, TISA, Wipro, etc. 100% of students got internships in TISA and more companies, with top roles including AI Researcher, ML Engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure, including Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a three-floor library, is in very good condition with AC. Hostel facilities, including food quality and a canteen, provide quality food to the students. They have sports facilities that occur in summer, where the winners get rewards. Medical facilities are also available in the institution.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty, good placement last year, happy to have good colleagues.

content.Placements: 40-50 percent of students got placed. The highest package is 7 LPA, the lowest is about 1 LPA-3 LPA, and the average is 4 LPA-5 LPA. Placement scenario in the college has recently increased as the number of students of electrical engineering has increased, and more for core branches.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is good. Labs are mid, and classrooms are average. There is no boys' hostel. I can't say anything about the hostel facility. The library section is very well organised and students have a peaceful environment in that. The labs are to be improved due to the equipment shortage.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Average college outside the city, pollution, and between nature.

content.Placements: The average package is approximately 6 LPA. Last year's highest package was 20 LPA. Best college in comparison to other colleges in Sikar City.
content.Infrastructure: Good hostel facility with proper drainage and water system. This college comes under BTU( Bikaner Technical University).
content.Faculty: The faculty is good. The curriculum is also good you have 6 lectures, of which one lecture is always sports, but on Wednesday and Friday, you will get two sports periods. Exams are average, the questions are very easy, and all questions are repeated from the previous year's papers. The course is designed well, but for Computer Science students, there is no language in the first year. The rest is best in comparison to other colleges in the city.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Do not come to this college.

content.Placements: Only a few companies account for 90 percent of sales. Almost all students can sit in placement, and also zero placement support from the faculty of the college. Only 2 or 3 good companies are coming to the college, and the average package offered is 5 LPA, which is also the highest.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi speed is average of 20 Mbps. The computer lab is excellent almost all pc are new. The canteen and mess food are also okay not that good. There is also no good opportunity in the sports field. The college environment is also not good. Classroom does not have smart boards.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall relentlessly intolerable college and staff .

content.Placements: About 10 percent of students were placed last year in my college. The highest package offered is about 4–5 LPA maximum, and the lowest is about 2 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS and local startups from Jaipur, etc. About 10–20 percent of students got internships through the college curriculum. Top roles in the course are junior developer, tester, senior software developer, and web designer, etc. You can expect these roles.
content.Infrastructure: The given and offered facilities are limited and very poor for my course. Sometimes necessary facilities like water are not there, and the water quality is also awful. Wi-Fi works sometimes and often goes offline. Labs are there, but not a single system works efficiently, and some of them are just trash with the lowest processors. There is only one central library, which opens at 10 am and closes at 5 pm, which is very basic. Hostel food is poor with no hygiene. The dining area is awful because of bad smell and poor maintenance. The food is tasteless, and the canteen closes at 9 pm.

Library is equipped with sufficient books and digital resources. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms, 24X7 water and electricity, and Wi-Fi access. The mess provides average but hygienic food with a good variety. Medical facilities are available on campus, and sports grounds are well-maintained for cricket, football, and indoor games. Overall, both academic and hostel infr...

Sports facilities, medical support and common rooms ensure a comfortable and supportive living environment for students.

The TNEA 2026 counselling application window is expected to launch in the first week of May 2026 for Dhirajlal Gandhi College Of Technology - DGCT admission to BE/BTech courses.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
Dhirajlal Gandhi College of Technology popular programmes are BTech and MTech. To offer courses in the Engineering stream, the college is equipped with the best of resources to ensure a high-quality education for undergraduate and postgraduate students. The students are taught fundamental understanding and several practical skills such as hardware design, programming languages, graphics, networks, databases and information retrieval, computer security, artificial intelligence, software design, all the things needed by the future leaders of computing and related professions.
Dhirajlal Gandhi College of Technology Engineering students can become Data Engineers, Software Engineers, and others. Dhirajlal Gandhi College of Technology students can enter non-technical streams and can become Marketing Managers, Customer Service Representatives, Sales Representatives, and others. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Dhirajlal Gandhi College of Technology and their respective eligibility and Dhirajlal Gandhi College of Technology fee structure:

They are majorly involved in the Engineering and IT sectors.

faqs.question: How are the placements at Dhirajlal Gandhi College of Technology?

answer.text: Dhirajlal Gandhi College of Technology fills up the government quota seats through state-level counselling of Anna University, Chennai. Aspirants who apply for UG level Engineering courses get admission through TNEA (Tamil Nadu Engineering Admission) counselling, whereas PG-level engineering are admitted through TANCET/GATE counselling. The university follows a single-window counselling admission system.After the student gets the respective scores from the required entrance exam students need to visit the official website to apply for the course. Aspirants can fill up the Google Application from the official website.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College is like another temple where our minds will be peaceful, and we can enjoy everything.

content.Placements: We are a 2026 pass-out batch currently pursuing. Placements are high in our college with good packages. Placements are important to get high-paid jobs, so we can develop our skills based on the guidance of our teachers. Companies like Infosys and Salesforce hire students. A lot of off-campus and on-campus drives happen here.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is excellent. The hostel has a friendly environment. Our labs have extra facilities. Every system works properly without any disturbance, such as Wi-Fi, etc. In the hostel, the food is very tasty and it is given to day scholars at a low price.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A short review about my college.

content.Placements: In our college, over 60% of students got placed in companies. The highest annual package is about 12 LPA. The lowest annual package is about 2 LPA. In our college, there are no internship offers and we should get internships on our own.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in our college are average because of lack of improper appliances in the lab and lack of books in library. Hostel is good to accommodate and the food they provide is pure veg. The food is above average to eat.

hostel_campus.college_name: Dhirajlal Gandhi College of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: College is like another temple where our minds will be peaceful, and we can enjoy everything.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent. The hostel has a friendly environment. Our labs have extra facilities. Every system works properly without any disturbance, such as Wi-Fi, etc. In the hostel, the food is very tasty and it is given to day scholars at a low price.

reviews.review_heading: A short review about my college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our college are average because of lack of improper appliances in the lab and lack of books in library. Hostel is good to accommodate and the food they provide is pure veg. The food is above average to eat.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for the one who loves studies and not much good college for the one who loves sports.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are good. There is Wi-Fi facility in our college. Classrooms are spacious and library is also very useful to use. The food served in canteen is better and hygienic. There is no importance for sports in our college. The main focus is only on studies.

reviews.review_heading: DGCT is a good college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good and clean. All the lab facilities are available. Wi-Fi and library are also good. Hostel is also very good. Canteen’s food is average. Sports activities are available. The college has good medical facilities. They also give good preference to sports.

reviews.review_heading: This college has good hostel facility.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the food served in the hostel is good like home-made food. It has low Mbps internet. The canteen is not good with snacks. Students do not show their interest in sports. The classrooms are good in this college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of our course environment and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and all labs are available which are required for our course, and there are classrooms and course library. Quality of our college, including mess, canteen, medical facilities, sports, food, bathroom, hostel rooms and hostel restrooms are approximately not worse, but they are average in quality.

reviews.review_heading: Overall it is a good college to study in Salem and Omalur region.
reviews.review_text: Our college is still developing on the infrastructure and has to improve much. There is a quite good infrastructure with a good architect and elevator facility. Library doesn't have much of stock but is pretty good. Labs and Wi-Fi connection must be improved. You will never feel crowed as they have spacious classes.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: The institute has the best infrastructure with Wi-Fi and innovative labs such as robotics and Tessolve and NI labs, etc. It has a departmental library as well as a general library. Every faculty member is so since and hard working. All the medical facilities, sports and canteen facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: This college is absolutely excellent because of teachers, infrastructure and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is awesome with a different structure. There is a high-speed Wi-Fi facility, and labs contain new technology materials and are clean. The quality of the food served is high. The infrastructure of our hostel is perfect, and the allotment of rooms for girls and boys is perfect.

reviews.review_heading: It is not an extraordinary college but compared to colleges in our zone, it is good.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides Wi-Fi facility in classrooms but not in all places. The library is good, and our college also has a digital library/. Classrooms are maintained good. The hostel facility is available where there are a gym and decent food facility.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of placements, but satisfied with faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was different from other colleges. The outlook of the college was very good. Washroom facilities were neat, and water facility is available at any time. Classrooms were wide, and sunlight could easily come inside the classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for studies.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi Facility was available only in office and labs. Classrooms were clean and neat. All the facilities and equipment are available in labs for all courses. We also have an E-library facility. First aid kits are also available. The quality of the food served in the hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a well-defined campus.
reviews.review_text: The college provides facilities like hygienic canteen, secured management, hostel facilities and travelling facilities. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The college provides 3-star hostel and food courts.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is provided in DHIRAJLAL GANDHI COLLEGE OF TECHNOLOGY campus fully. Wi-Fi is available in cafeteria and hostel also. The library is centralised and department library is also available. Several foreign author books are available in the library. Sports & games are less appreciated.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with a few faculty. Placements were good in 2018.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. Since the college management is running under the civil department, there are no issues regarding the infrastructure of the college. There is a separate library for the students, and the library is also enabled with internet facilities.

likes.text: Companies Like Byju's, Jaro Education and RDC concrete visit our campus for recruitment.
The companies which recruit the students of our college give good feedback, Also, companies will visit the college to offer placements next year.

faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.
faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?

faqs.answer: A:    The salary for BTech Petroleum Engineering freshers in India depends on a lot of factors like academic record, skill set, internship experience, company location, etc. Initially, you can get approximately INR 4 LPA to INR 6 LPA after completing the BTech Petroleum Engg. course. As you earn a few years of experience in the field, you can easily earn between INR 6 LPA and INR 10 LPA at the mid-senior level. For senior-level positions, the salary can go up to INR 15 LPA. Recruiters pay more to people who have the right set of skills and experience and help in their business growth.Know more about -Petroleum Engineering Courses

reviews_list.review_title: I am very much dissatisfied .

review_content.Placements: 98% of students were placed in my course. The highest package will be of 90,000 and the lowest package will be 68,000. I don't know about it, but we have alumni with best company profiles, etc. And recruitment will depend on only the students hard work, passion and abilities. 86% of students will get internships before the start of 7th semester. Build a website, create a mobile application, do some coding, and more.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have the best classrooms with the best infrastructure. We have different labs with all the facilities, like computers and hardware parts. In college, every year there will be sports events organized by the management and we have an open area for basketball, cricket, football and all. We also have canteen but there will be only drinks and some snacks, not dal and price. I hope it will be on the on the menu.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The college has a green campus with great teachers, but the hostel needs to be improved.

review_content.Placements: As a medical college, they do not have any placements like that of engineering colleges, but clinical practices have helped a lot. Practical knowledge and the internship programme helps us to understand the patients. As we are 161 members, all my seniors have got internships in the college itself.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is a waste. There are no basic amenities in the hostel. But apart for the hostel, the campus is very beautiful and full of greenery. There is no Wi-Fi. The canteen is average having less items on the menu. Good medical facilities are available while the sports activities are still developing. Games are held every year on a university level.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied by the faculty of teaching and hostel.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 80 percent of strength is in computer Science. The highest is 150000, and the average is 75000, the lowest is 65000. not sure about the companies.85 percent of students got internship in different companies. Top roles in my course, data analysis. Coder. App developer. Web developer. Etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a very good library, but they have old edition of the books. And they do not provide the students with the books. Hostel is very good, with clean and hygiene maintenance. Food is excellent with hygiene. They provide you with tea three time in a day. Breakfast is made early and served.

overview_faqs.answer: The salary for BTech Petroleum Engineering freshers in India depends on a lot of factors like academic record, skill set, internship experience, company location, etc. Initially, you can get approximately INR 4 LPA to INR 6 LPA after completing the BTech Petroleum Engg. course. As you earn a few years of experience in the field, you can easily earn between INR 6 LPA and INR 10 LPA at the mid-senior level. For senior-level positions, the salary can go up to INR 15 LPA. Recruiters pay more to people who have the right set of skills and experience and help in their business growth.Know more about -Petroleum Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: Khaja Bandanawaz University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best college of Gulbarga.

content.Placements: Any student who has passed in PUC or Diploma can join this university; no percentage is fixed. There are no placement facilities in this university, and no companies are hiring from this university because they don't provide placements to students. The placements are poor.
content.Infrastructure: The university has hostels for boys and girls, but the boys' hostel has a decent building, and the girls' hostel has a great building. In the boys' hostel, they don't have proper washrooms, and the cost of the hostel food is average, but good quality food is provided by the university.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and facilities but not satisfied by faculty.

content.Placements: There are no placement programs or offers from the college for students yet. The campus is on-going vast development and we hope it also provides placement facilities in the upcoming years.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of Khaja Bandanawaz University is absolutely mind-blowing. The university campus is spread over 50 acres of land. It has a gym and a garden for relaxation. The campus is very cold because of the huge trees. The classrooms are also very good.
content.Faculty: The teachers at this college are very knowledgeable and helpful. They are qualified doctors, and the teaching quality is above average. The semester exams are easy to difficult based on the learner, and the pass percentage is 85-90%.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am very much dissatisfied .

content.Placements: 98% of students were placed in my course. The highest package will be of 90,000 and the lowest package will be 68,000. I don't know about it, but we have alumni with best company profiles, etc. And recruitment will depend on only the students hard work, passion and abilities. 86% of students will get internships before the start of 7th semester. Build a website, create a mobile application, do some coding, and more.
content.Infrastructure: We have the best classrooms with the best infrastructure. We have different labs with all the facilities, like computers and hardware parts. In college, every year there will be sports events organized by the management and we have an open area for basketball, cricket, football and all. We also have canteen but there will be only drinks and some snacks, not dal and price. I hope it will be on the on the menu.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college has a green campus with great teachers, but the hostel needs to be improved.

content.Placements: As a medical college, they do not have any placements like that of engineering colleges, but clinical practices have helped a lot. Practical knowledge and the internship programme helps us to understand the patients. As we are 161 members, all my seniors have got internships in the college itself.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is a waste. There are no basic amenities in the hostel. But apart for the hostel, the campus is very beautiful and full of greenery. There is no Wi-Fi. The canteen is average having less items on the menu. Good medical facilities are available while the sports activities are still developing. Games are held every year on a university level.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied by the faculty of teaching and hostel.

content.Placements: Approximately 80 percent of strength is in computer Science. The highest is 150000, and the average is 75000, the lowest is 65000. not sure about the companies.85 percent of students got internship in different companies. Top roles in my course, data analysis. Coder. App developer. Web developer. Etc.
content.Infrastructure: There is a very good library, but they have old edition of the books. And they do not provide the students with the books. Hostel is very good, with clean and hygiene maintenance. Food is excellent with hygiene. They provide you with tea three time in a day. Breakfast is made early and served.

faqs.question: Can I become a lawyer after completing my LLB?
faqs.answer: No, After completing LLB you become a lawyer, however, you are still not an advocate and hence cannot practice law.To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear theAll India Bar Examination (AIBE). After qualifying AIBE, one can practice law as a full fledged profession.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

reviews.review_heading: Best college of Gulbarga.
reviews.review_text: The university has hostels for boys and girls, but the boys' hostel has a decent building, and the girls' hostel has a great building. In the boys' hostel, they don't have proper washrooms, and the cost of the hostel food is average, but good quality food is provided by the university.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities but not satisfied by faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Khaja Bandanawaz University is absolutely mind-blowing. The university campus is spread over 50 acres of land. It has a gym and a garden for relaxation. The campus is very cold because of the huge trees. The classrooms are also very good.

reviews.review_heading: I am very much dissatisfied .
reviews.review_text: We have the best classrooms with the best infrastructure. We have different labs with all the facilities, like computers and hardware parts. In college, every year there will be sports events organized by the management and we have an open area for basketball, cricket, football and all. We also have canteen but there will be only drinks and some snacks, not dal and price. I hope it will be on the on the menu.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a green campus with great teachers, but the hostel needs to be improved.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is a waste. There are no basic amenities in the hostel. But apart for the hostel, the campus is very beautiful and full of greenery. There is no Wi-Fi. The canteen is average having less items on the menu. Good medical facilities are available while the sports activities are still developing. Games are held every year on a university level.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied by the faculty of teaching and hostel.
reviews.review_text: There is a very good library, but they have old edition of the books. And they do not provide the students with the books. Hostel is very good, with clean and hygiene maintenance. Food is excellent with hygiene. They provide you with tea three time in a day. Breakfast is made early and served.

reviews.review_heading: The college is decent to get a degree.
reviews.review_text: The college has very poor infrastructure. The road is bad for a long time. Currently, it is getting renovated after becoming an autonomous college. The college does not provide Wi-Fi facility. The library is old. In the classrooms, there are pigeons. There is no proper parking area.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Khaja Banda Nawaz College of Engineering, Gulbarga.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average, and it could be good enough as it becomes a university now. It should have good infrastructure, but it is average for now. The college does not provide Wi-Fi facility and labs. Central and department library is available for the students. It provides a paid hostel facility for students. Mess and canteen are available. Games facilities are not available.

reviews.review_heading: Kbn university absolutely good faculty of biotechnology in 2023.
reviews.review_text:
-Everything is available Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms. Classrooms are good
Wi-Fi is available always
Labs are good and some instruments are not there
-There is no hostel facility
May be now they will provide hostel facility 
During our time there was no hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to study in but not for enjoyment.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi hotspot is enabled in the college for college students for coding and much more. Many las are available for courses like Physics, Chemistry, Computer Science, electronics and electricals. Library is also available in the college. Students do not eat in canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has excellent faculty members and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college is surrounded by lush greenery. Our labs are good. The library is good. The canteen is available. The gym is good. Sports are played every week, and many sports events are organised.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: Labs are available in our college. The infrastructure of our college is not good. Our college has a good library where students can study without any disturbance. Many books are available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: There is no campus placements .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the engineering college is quite below average, buildings are more than 30 years old and the roads to the departments are just even wrost. The library, laboratories, and classrooms are big. The hostel is average. The canteen is good. Medical facilities are also good.

review_content.General: Facilities and infrastructure provided in our college were not up to the mark. Wi-Fi was not provided on campus. Classrooms were not digitalised. Library was good, but didn't contain every study material. Wi-Fi facility was provided in the hostel, and the food served was up to the mark. Canteen served spicy food items available. Medical facilities were not available on campus. Sports and games were well organised. It conducts a tough competition in the sports section every week.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Jorhat Institute of Science and Technology formerly known as Science College.

review_content.Placements: About 40% of students were placed as per 2022 batch. The highest package was 6Lac per annum and the average was around 2L per annum and the lowest was 144000 per annum. Byju's and Infosys were the top companies for sales. Almost all students got internships from my course and the companies were Irrigation, Railway, Pwd etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is limited facilities as compared to other engineering college in Assam. There are three college buses in the campus which helps students to reach college from a far distance also. There is table tennis room and also there is a basketball court in the campus. You will get open field playground for cricket and football as well as volleyball. There are 3 boys hostel and 2 girls hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Power Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: Every year many students get placed in reputed companies like NRL, TCS, Infosys, Wipro, CRTD Technology, etc. The highest salary package offered is 11 LPA. The average salary package offered is 6 LPA. Most of our seniors also are working in MNCs in top roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are well equipped and hygienic. A Wi-Fi facility is also available on our campus. There is also a library in our college where students can get thousands of books for every subject and department. There is a fresh environment in the library. Hostel facilities are also excellent.

review_summary.college_name: Jorhat Institute of Science and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Have some satisfaction as it doesn't have a good placement till now.

content.Placements: Almost 30% of the students got placed, with salaries ranging from a minimum of 4 LPA to a maximum of 6.5 LPA. Core companies did not participate in the placement process. Most students secured internships with companies such as IOCL, ONGC, and ASTC. Companies like RDC Concrete and TCS come for requirements based on the student's academic performance.
content.Infrastructure: The engineering department has basic facilities. Labs don't have all the equipment, and the college infrastructure is also basic, but it does have Wi-Fi and digital classrooms. The hostel offers decent facilities, and the food in the mess is decent.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Power Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is an average college for science students.

content.Placements: A minimum of 40% of students got placed on campus. The highest salary package offered in the electronics department was 7 LPA, the lowest salary package was 2 LPA, and the average salary package was 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Indian Oil, ONGC, Amul, etc. Around 10% of students hardly got internships in this college. Other students need to find online internships on online platforms like Internshala and LinkedIn. Top roles offered were assistant or associate developer, management trainee, and software developer trainee.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure provided in our college were not up to the mark. Wi-Fi was not provided on campus. Classrooms were not digitalised. Library was good, but didn't contain every study material. Wi-Fi facility was provided in the hostel, and the food served was up to the mark. Canteen served spicy food items available. Medical facilities were not available on campus. Sports and games were well organised. It conducts a tough competition in the sports section every week.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Jorhat Institute of Science and Technology formerly known as Science College.

content.Placements: About 40% of students were placed as per 2022 batch. The highest package was 6Lac per annum and the average was around 2L per annum and the lowest was 144000 per annum. Byju's and Infosys were the top companies for sales. Almost all students got internships from my course and the companies were Irrigation, Railway, Pwd etc.
content.Infrastructure: There is limited facilities as compared to other engineering college in Assam. There are three college buses in the campus which helps students to reach college from a far distance also. There is table tennis room and also there is a basketball court in the campus. You will get open field playground for cricket and football as well as volleyball. There are 3 boys hostel and 2 girls hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Power Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Every year many students get placed in reputed companies like NRL, TCS, Infosys, Wipro, CRTD Technology, etc. The highest salary package offered is 11 LPA. The average salary package offered is 6 LPA. Most of our seniors also are working in MNCs in top roles.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are well equipped and hygienic. A Wi-Fi facility is also available on our campus. There is also a library in our college where students can get thousands of books for every subject and department. There is a fresh environment in the library. Hostel facilities are also excellent.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college is average enough to become an engineer.

content.Placements: Placements in JIST are not that good, but the situations are improving day by day. The placement for ETC and mechanical department is good but for civil engineering, you don't have much scope on campus. NRL, IGCL, and Byjus visited the campus this year. It's not clear how much average package one gets on campus placements in civil engineering here. But if you score among top 2 from all the 4 branches you will get an internship abroad.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and library are average. The number of books are not sufficient but the authority is planning to buy more books this year. Wi-Fi is provided in the hostel. JIST has 3 boys hostel, and 2 girls hostels. The quality of food served is like any other Indian college. We have a small canteen on campus. There is also a dispensary in the college for emergencies. If you are into sports, you can join several sports clubs here.
